creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Mon Mar 11 01:53:49 2013
New Revision: 313853
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313853

Log:
  - Fix build with latest glib update
  - Fix plist referencing bad PREFIX/share/man directory
  - Trim header
  
  PR:		ports/176778
  Submitted by:	Takashi Matsubara <t-matubara@miracle.ocn.ne.jp>
  Approved by:	Ivan Klymenko <fidaj@ukr.net> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-src__gldit__cairo-dock-keybinder.h   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/Makefile
  head/deskutils/cairo-dock/pkg-plist

Modified: head/deskutils/cairo-dock/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/deskutils/cairo-dock/Makefile	Mon Mar 11 01:38:26 2013	(r313852)
+++ head/deskutils/cairo-dock/Makefile	Mon Mar 11 01:53:49 2013	(r313853)
@@ -1,9 +1,5 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	cairo-dock
-# Date created:		2010-03-18
-# Whom:			Ivan Klymenko <fidaj@ukr.net>
-#
+# Created by: Ivan Klymenko <fidaj@ukr.net>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	cairo-dock
 DISTVERSION=	2.3.0~3

Added: head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-src__gldit__cairo-dock-keybinder.h
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/deskutils/cairo-dock/files/patch-src__gldit__cairo-dock-keybinder.h	Mon Mar 11 01:53:49 2013	(r313853)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- src/gldit/cairo-dock-keybinder.h.orig       2013-03-09 17:10:41.000000000 +0900
++++ src/gldit/cairo-dock-keybinder.h    2013-03-09 17:11:12.000000000 +0900
+@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@
+ #ifndef __CD_KEY_BINDER_H__
+ #define __CD_KEY_BINDER_H__
+
+-#include <glib/gtypes.h>
++#include <glib.h>
+ #include "cairo-dock-struct.h"
+ #include "cairo-dock-manager.h"

Modified: head/deskutils/cairo-dock/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/deskutils/cairo-dock/pkg-plist	Mon Mar 11 01:38:26 2013	(r313852)
+++ head/deskutils/cairo-dock/pkg-plist	Mon Mar 11 01:53:49 2013	(r313853)
@@ -266,8 +266,6 @@ share/pixmaps/cairo-dock.svg
 @dirrmtry share/applications
 @dirrmtry share/locale/fo/LC_MESSAGES
 @dirrmtry share/locale/fo
-@dirrmtry share/man/man1
-@dirrmtry share/man
 @dirrm include/cairo-dock/implementations
 @dirrm include/cairo-dock/icon-factory
 @dirrm include/cairo-dock/cairo-dock
